name: Hershey Holiday Sugar Cookies
recipeIngredient: 9 oz Hershey-ets Candy Coated Chocolate pkg
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. In a large mixing bowl, cream together the butter, light brown sugar, and granulated sugar until light and fluffy. Add the egg and vanilla extract; beat well. Combine the baking soda, baking powder, and salt in a separate bowl. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture alternately with buttermilk. Stir in the Hershey-ets Candy Coated Chocolate pieces. Drop by level 1/4 cupfuls about 3 inches apart onto lightly greased cookie sheets. Bake for 12 to 14 minutes or until lightly browned. Allow cookies to cool slightly on the baking sheet, then transfer them to a wire rack to cool completely. Makes approximately 16 cookies.
